members.name: AddButton
members.signature: public void AddButton(int column, Texture2D button, int id, bool disabled, String tooltipText, String description)
members.summary: Adds a button with [Texture2D] [param button] to the end of the cell at column [param column]. The [param id] is used to identify the button in the according [signal Tree.button_clicked] signal and can be different from the buttons index. If not specified, the next available index is used, which may be retrieved by calling [method get_button_count] immediately before this method. Optionally, the button can be [param disabled] and have a [param tooltip_text]. [param description] is used as the button description for assistive apps.

members.name: AddChild
members.summary: Adds a previously unparented [TreeItem] as a direct child of this one. The [param child] item must not be a part of any [Tree] or parented to any [TreeItem]. See also [method remove_child].

members.name: CallRecursive
members.summary: Calls the [param method] on the actual TreeItem and its children recursively. Pass parameters as a comma separated list.

members.name: ClearButtons
members.summary: Removes all buttons from all columns of this item.

members.name: ClearCustomBgColor
members.summary: Resets the background color for the given column to default.

members.name: ClearCustomColor
members.summary: Resets the color for the given column to default.

members.name: CreateChild
members.summary: Creates an item and adds it as a child. The new item will be inserted as position [param index] (the default value [code]-1[/code] means the last position), or it will be the last child if [param index] is higher than the child count.

members.name: Deselect
members.summary: Deselects the given column.

members.name: EraseButton
members.signature: public void EraseButton(int column, int buttonIndex)
members.summary: Removes the button at index [param button_index] in column [param column].

members.name: GetAutoTranslateMode
members.summary: Returns the column's auto translate mode.

members.name: GetAutowrapMode
members.summary: Returns the text autowrap mode in the given [param column]. By default it is [constant TextServer.AUTOWRAP_OFF].

members.name: GetAutowrapTrimFlags
members.summary: Returns the autowrap trim flags for the given [param column]. By default, both [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_START_EDGE_SPACES] and [constant TextServer.BREAK_TRIM_END_EDGE_SPACES] are enabled.

members.name: GetButton
members.signature: public Texture2D GetButton(int column, int buttonIndex)
members.summary: Returns the [Texture2D] of the button at index [param button_index] in column [param column].

members.name: GetButtonById
members.signature: public int GetButtonById(int column, int id)
members.summary: Returns the button index if there is a button with ID [param id] in column [param column], otherwise returns -1.

members.name: GetButtonColor
members.signature: public Color GetButtonColor(int column, int id)
members.summary: Returns the color of the button with ID [param id] in column [param column]. If the specified button does not exist, returns [constant Color.BLACK].

members.name: GetButtonCount
members.summary: Returns the number of buttons in column [param column].

members.name: GetButtonId
members.signature: public int GetButtonId(int column, int buttonIndex)
members.summary: Returns the ID for the button at index [param button_index] in column [param column].

members.name: GetButtonTooltipText
members.signature: public String GetButtonTooltipText(int column, int buttonIndex)
members.summary: Returns the tooltip text for the button at index [param button_index] in column [param column].

members.name: GetCellMode
members.summary: Returns the column's cell mode.

members.name: GetChild
members.summary: Returns a child item by its [param index] (see [method get_child_count]). This method is often used for iterating all children of an item. Negative indices access the children from the last one.

members.name: GetChildCount
members.summary: Returns the number of child items.

members.name: GetChildren
members.summary: Returns an array of references to the item's children.

members.name: GetCustomBgColor
members.summary: Returns the custom background color of column [param column].

members.name: GetCustomColor
members.summary: Returns the custom color of column [param column].

members.name: GetCustomDrawCallback
members.summary: Returns the custom callback of column [param column].

members.name: GetCustomFont
members.summary: Returns custom font used to draw text in the column [param column].

members.name: GetCustomFontSize
members.summary: Returns custom font size used to draw text in the column [param column].

members.name: GetCustomStylebox
members.summary: Returns the given column's custom [StyleBox] used to draw the background.

members.name: GetDescription
members.summary: Returns the given column's description for assistive apps.

members.name: GetExpandRight
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [code]expand_right[/code] is set.

members.name: GetFirstChild
members.summary: Returns the TreeItem's first child.

members.name: GetIcon
members.summary: Returns the given column's icon [Texture2D]. Error if no icon is set.

members.name: GetIconMaxWidth
members.summary: Returns the maximum allowed width of the icon in the given [param column].

members.name: GetIconModulate
members.summary: Returns the [Color] modulating the column's icon.

members.name: GetIconOverlay
members.summary: Returns the given column's icon overlay [Texture2D].

members.name: GetIconRegion
members.summary: Returns the icon [Texture2D] region as [Rect2].

members.name: GetIndex
members.summary: Returns the node's order in the tree. For example, if called on the first child item the position is [code]0[/code].

members.name: GetLanguage
members.summary: Returns item's text language code.

members.name: GetMetadata
members.summary: Returns the metadata value that was set for the given column using [method set_metadata].

members.name: GetNext
members.summary: Returns the next sibling TreeItem in the tree or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none.

members.name: GetNextInTree
members.summary: Returns the next TreeItem in the tree (in the context of a depth-first search) or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none. If [param wrap] is enabled, the method will wrap around to the first element in the tree when called on the last element, otherwise it returns [code]null[/code].

members.name: GetNextVisible
members.summary: Returns the next visible TreeItem in the tree (in the context of a depth-first search) or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none. If [param wrap] is enabled, the method will wrap around to the first visible element in the tree when called on the last visible element, otherwise it returns [code]null[/code].

members.name: GetParent
members.summary: Returns the parent TreeItem or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none.

members.name: GetPrev
members.summary: Returns the previous sibling TreeItem in the tree or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none.

members.name: GetPrevInTree
members.summary: Returns the previous TreeItem in the tree (in the context of a depth-first search) or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none. If [param wrap] is enabled, the method will wrap around to the last element in the tree when called on the first visible element, otherwise it returns [code]null[/code].

members.name: GetPrevVisible
members.summary: Returns the previous visible sibling TreeItem in the tree (in the context of a depth-first search) or a [code]null[/code] object if there is none. If [param wrap] is enabled, the method will wrap around to the last visible element in the tree when called on the first visible element, otherwise it returns [code]null[/code].

members.name: GetRange
members.summary: Returns the value of a [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE] column.

members.name: GetRangeConfig
members.summary: Returns a dictionary containing the range parameters for a given column. The keys are "min", "max", "step", and "expr".

members.name: GetStructuredTextBidiOverride
members.summary: Returns the BiDi algorithm override set for this cell.

members.name: GetStructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.summary: Returns the additional BiDi options set for this cell.

members.name: GetSuffix
members.summary: Gets the suffix string shown after the column value.

members.name: GetText
members.summary: Returns the given column's text.

members.name: GetTextAlignment
members.summary: Returns the given column's text alignment.

members.name: GetTextDirection
members.summary: Returns item's text base writing direction.

members.name: GetTextOverrunBehavior
members.summary: Returns the clipping behavior when the text exceeds the item's bounding rectangle in the given [param column]. By default it is [constant TextServer.OVERRUN_TRIM_ELLIPSIS].

members.name: GetTooltipText
members.summary: Returns the given column's tooltip text.

members.name: GetTree
members.summary: Returns the [Tree] that owns this TreeItem.

members.name: IsAcceptingChildren
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this [TreeItem] is allowed to accept children.

members.name: IsAnyCollapsed
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this [TreeItem], or any of its descendants, is collapsed. If [param only_visible] is [code]true[/code] it ignores non-visible [TreeItem]s.

members.name: IsButtonDisabled
members.signature: public bool IsButtonDisabled(int column, int buttonIndex)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the button at index [param button_index] for the given [param column] is disabled.

members.name: IsChecked
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is checked.

members.name: IsCustomSetAsButton
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the cell was made into a button with [method set_custom_as_button].

members.name: IsEditMultiline
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is multiline editable.

members.name: IsEditable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is editable.

members.name: IsIndeterminate
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is indeterminate.

members.name: IsSelectable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is selectable.

members.name: IsSelected
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param column] is selected.

members.name: IsVisibleInTree
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [member visible] is [code]true[/code] and all its ancestors are also visible.

members.name: MoveAfter
members.summary: Moves this TreeItem right after the given [param item]. [b]Note:[/b] You can't move to the root or move the root.

members.name: MoveBefore
members.summary: Moves this TreeItem right before the given [param item]. [b]Note:[/b] You can't move to the root or move the root.

members.name: PropagateCheck
members.signature: public void PropagateCheck(int column, bool emitSignal)
members.summary: Propagates this item's checked status to its children and parents for the given [param column]. It is possible to process the items affected by this method call by connecting to [signal Tree.check_propagated_to_item]. The order that the items affected will be processed is as follows: the item invoking this method, children of that item, and finally parents of that item. If [param emit_signal] is [code]false[/code], then [signal Tree.check_propagated_to_item] will not be emitted.

members.name: RemoveChild
members.summary: Removes the given child [TreeItem] and all its children from the [Tree]. Note that it doesn't free the item from memory, so it can be reused later (see [method add_child]). To completely remove a [TreeItem] use [method Object.free]. [b]Note:[/b] If you want to move a child from one [Tree] to another, then instead of removing and adding it manually you can use [method move_before] or [method move_after].

members.name: Select
members.signature: public void Select(int column, bool setAsCursor)
members.summary: Selects the given [param column]. If [param set_as_cursor] is [code]true[/code], the [Tree]'s cursor will be moved to this item (only matters if [member Tree.select_mode] is set to [constant Tree.SELECT_MULTI]).

members.name: SetAcceptChildren
members.summary: Sets [TreeItem]'s ability to accept children.

members.name: SetAutoTranslateMode
members.signature: public void SetAutoTranslateMode(int column, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the given column's auto translate mode to [param mode]. All columns use [constant Node.AUTO_TRANSLATE_MODE_INHERIT] by default, which uses the same auto translate mode as the [Tree] itself.

members.name: SetAutowrapMode
members.signature: public void SetAutowrapMode(int column, int autowrapMode)
members.summary: Sets the autowrap mode in the given [param column]. If set to something other than [constant TextServer.AUTOWRAP_OFF], the text gets wrapped inside the cell's bounding rectangle.

members.name: SetAutowrapTrimFlags
members.signature: public void SetAutowrapTrimFlags(int column, int flags)
members.summary: Sets the autowrap trim flags for the given [param column]. These flags control whether leading and trailing spaces are trimmed on wrapped lines. Set to [code]0[/code] to disable all trimming.

members.name: SetButton
members.signature: public void SetButton(int column, int buttonIndex, Texture2D button)
members.summary: Sets the given column's button [Texture2D] at index [param button_index] to [param button].

members.name: SetButtonColor
members.signature: public void SetButtonColor(int column, int buttonIndex, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the given column's button color at index [param button_index] to [param color].

members.name: SetButtonDescription
members.signature: public void SetButtonDescription(int column, int buttonIndex, String description)
members.summary: Sets the given column's button description at index [param button_index] for assistive apps.

members.name: SetButtonDisabled
members.signature: public void SetButtonDisabled(int column, int buttonIndex, bool disabled)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], disables the button at index [param button_index] in the given [param column].

members.name: SetButtonTooltipText
members.signature: public void SetButtonTooltipText(int column, int buttonIndex, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets the tooltip text for the button at index [param button_index] in the given [param column].

members.name: SetCellMode
members.signature: public void SetCellMode(int column, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the given column's cell mode to [param mode]. This determines how the cell is displayed and edited.

members.name: SetChecked
members.summary: If [param checked] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is checked. Clears column's indeterminate status.

members.name: SetCollapsedRecursive
members.summary: Collapses or uncollapses this [TreeItem] and all the descendants of this item.

members.name: SetCustomAsButton
members.signature: public void SetCustomAsButton(int column, bool enable)
members.summary: Makes a cell with [constant CELL_MODE_CUSTOM] display as a non-flat button with a [StyleBox].

members.name: SetCustomBgColor
members.signature: public void SetCustomBgColor(int column, Color color, bool justOutline)
members.summary: Sets the given column's custom background color and whether to just use it as an outline. [b]Note:[/b] If a custom [StyleBox] is set, the background color will be drawn behind it.

members.name: SetCustomColor
members.signature: public void SetCustomColor(int column, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the given column's custom color.

members.name: SetCustomDraw
members.signature: public void SetCustomDraw(int column, Object @object, StringName callback)
members.summary: Sets the given column's custom draw callback to the [param callback] method on [param object]. The method named [param callback] should accept two arguments: the [TreeItem] that is drawn and its position and size as a [Rect2].

members.name: SetCustomDrawCallback
members.signature: public void SetCustomDrawCallback(int column, Callable callback)
members.summary: Sets the given column's custom draw callback. Use an empty [Callable] ([code skip-lint]Callable()[/code]) to clear the custom callback. The cell has to be in [constant CELL_MODE_CUSTOM] to use this feature. The [param callback] should accept two arguments: the [TreeItem] that is drawn and its position and size as a [Rect2]. To draw custom content over the native style, please use [method Tree.get_custom_drawing_canvas_item].

members.name: SetCustomFont
members.signature: public void SetCustomFont(int column, Font font)
members.summary: Sets custom font used to draw text in the given [param column].

members.name: SetCustomFontSize
members.signature: public void SetCustomFontSize(int column, int fontSize)
members.summary: Sets custom font size used to draw text in the given [param column].

members.name: SetCustomStylebox
members.signature: public void SetCustomStylebox(int column, StyleBox stylebox)
members.summary: Sets the given column's custom [StyleBox] used to draw the background. [b]Note:[/b] If a custom background color is set, the [StyleBox] will be drawn in front of it.

members.name: SetDescription
members.signature: public void SetDescription(int column, String description)
members.summary: Sets the given column's description for assistive apps.

members.name: SetEditMultiline
members.signature: public void SetEditMultiline(int column, bool multiline)
members.summary: If [param multiline] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is multiline editable. [b]Note:[/b] This option only affects the type of control ([LineEdit] or [TextEdit]) that appears when editing the column. You can set multiline values with [method set_text] even if the column is not multiline editable.

members.name: SetEditable
members.signature: public void SetEditable(int column, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is editable.

members.name: SetExpandRight
members.signature: public void SetExpandRight(int column, bool enable)
members.summary: If [param enable] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is expanded to the right.

members.name: SetIcon
members.signature: public void SetIcon(int column, Texture2D texture)
members.summary: Sets the given cell's icon [Texture2D]. If the cell is in [constant CELL_MODE_ICON] mode, the icon is displayed in the center of the cell. Otherwise, the icon is displayed before the cell's text. [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE] does not display an icon.

members.name: SetIconMaxWidth
members.signature: public void SetIconMaxWidth(int column, int width)
members.summary: Sets the maximum allowed width of the icon in the given [param column]. This limit is applied on top of the default size of the icon and on top of [theme_item Tree.icon_max_width]. The height is adjusted according to the icon's ratio.

members.name: SetIconModulate
members.signature: public void SetIconModulate(int column, Color modulate)
members.summary: Modulates the given column's icon with [param modulate].

members.name: SetIconOverlay
members.signature: public void SetIconOverlay(int column, Texture2D texture)
members.summary: Sets the given cell's icon overlay [Texture2D]. The cell has to be in [constant CELL_MODE_ICON] mode, and icon has to be set. Overlay is drawn on top of icon, in the bottom left corner.

members.name: SetIconRegion
members.signature: public void SetIconRegion(int column, Rect2 region)
members.summary: Sets the given column's icon's texture region.

members.name: SetIndeterminate
members.signature: public void SetIndeterminate(int column, bool indeterminate)
members.summary: If [param indeterminate] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is marked indeterminate. [b]Note:[/b] If set [code]true[/code] from [code]false[/code], then column is cleared of checked status.

members.name: SetLanguage
members.signature: public void SetLanguage(int column, String language)
members.summary: Sets the language code of the given [param column]'s text to [param language]. This is used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If [param language] is empty, the current locale is used.

members.name: SetMetadata
members.signature: public void SetMetadata(int column, Variant meta)
members.summary: Sets the metadata value for the given column, which can be retrieved later using [method get_metadata]. This can be used, for example, to store a reference to the original data.

members.name: SetRange
members.signature: public void SetRange(int column, float value)
members.summary: Sets the value of a [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE] column.

members.name: SetRangeConfig
members.signature: public void SetRangeConfig(int column, float min, float max, float step, bool expr)
members.summary: Sets the range of accepted values for a column. The column must be in the [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE] mode. If [param expr] is [code]true[/code], the edit mode slider will use an exponential scale as with [member Range.exp_edit].

members.name: SetSelectable
members.signature: public void SetSelectable(int column, bool selectable)
members.summary: If [param selectable] is [code]true[/code], the given [param column] is selectable.

members.name: SetStructuredTextBidiOverride
members.signature: public void SetStructuredTextBidiOverride(int column, int parser)
members.summary: Set BiDi algorithm override for the structured text. Has effect for cells that display text.

members.name: SetStructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions
members.signature: public void SetStructuredTextBidiOverrideOptions(int column, Array args)
members.summary: Set additional options for BiDi override. Has effect for cells that display text.

members.name: SetSuffix
members.signature: public void SetSuffix(int column, String text)
members.summary: Sets a string to be shown after a column's value (for example, a unit abbreviation).

members.name: SetText
members.signature: public void SetText(int column, String text)
members.summary: Sets the given column's text value.

members.name: SetTextAlignment
members.signature: public void SetTextAlignment(int column, int textAlignment)
members.summary: Sets the given column's text alignment to [param text_alignment].

members.name: SetTextDirection
members.signature: public void SetTextDirection(int column, int direction)
members.summary: Sets item's text base writing direction.

members.name: SetTextOverrunBehavior
members.signature: public void SetTextOverrunBehavior(int column, int overrunBehavior)
members.summary: Sets the clipping behavior when the text exceeds the item's bounding rectangle in the given [param column].

members.name: SetTooltipText
members.signature: public void SetTooltipText(int column, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets the given column's tooltip text.

members.name: UncollapseTree
members.summary: Uncollapses all [TreeItem]s necessary to reveal this [TreeItem], i.e. all ancestor [TreeItem]s.

members.name: Collapsed
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the TreeItem is collapsed.

members.name: CustomMinimumHeight
members.summary: The custom minimum height.

members.name: DisableFolding
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], folding is disabled for this TreeItem.

members.name: Visible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the [TreeItem] is visible (default). Note that if a [TreeItem] is set to not be visible, none of its children will be visible either.

values.name: CELL_MODE_CHECK
values.summary: Cell shows a checkbox, optionally with text and an icon. The checkbox can be pressed, released, or indeterminate (via [method set_indeterminate]). The checkbox can't be clicked unless the cell is editable.

values.name: CELL_MODE_CUSTOM
values.summary: Cell shows as a clickable button. It will display an arrow similar to [OptionButton], but doesn't feature a dropdown (for that you can use [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE]). Clicking the button emits the [signal Tree.item_edited] signal. The button is flat by default, you can use [method set_custom_as_button] to display it with a [StyleBox]. This mode also supports custom drawing using [method set_custom_draw_callback].

values.name: CELL_MODE_ICON
values.summary: Cell shows an icon. It can't be edited nor display text. The icon is always centered within the cell.

values.name: CELL_MODE_RANGE
values.summary: Cell shows a numeric range. When editable, it can be edited using a range slider. Use [method set_range] to set the value and [method set_range_config] to configure the range. This cell can also be used in a text dropdown mode when you assign a text with [method set_text]. Separate options with a comma, e.g. [code]"Option1,Option2,Option3"[/code].

values.name: CELL_MODE_STRING
values.summary: Cell shows a string label, optionally with an icon. When editable, the text can be edited using a [LineEdit], or a [TextEdit] popup if [method set_edit_multiline] is used.

constants.name: CELL_MODE_STRING
constants.summary: Cell shows a string label, optionally with an icon. When editable, the text can be edited using a [LineEdit], or a [TextEdit] popup if [method set_edit_multiline] is used.

constants.name: CELL_MODE_CHECK
constants.summary: Cell shows a checkbox, optionally with text and an icon. The checkbox can be pressed, released, or indeterminate (via [method set_indeterminate]). The checkbox can't be clicked unless the cell is editable.

constants.name: CELL_MODE_RANGE
constants.summary: Cell shows a numeric range. When editable, it can be edited using a range slider. Use [method set_range] to set the value and [method set_range_config] to configure the range. This cell can also be used in a text dropdown mode when you assign a text with [method set_text]. Separate options with a comma, e.g. [code]"Option1,Option2,Option3"[/code].

constants.name: CELL_MODE_ICON
constants.summary: Cell shows an icon. It can't be edited nor display text. The icon is always centered within the cell.

constants.name: CELL_MODE_CUSTOM
constants.summary: Cell shows as a clickable button. It will display an arrow similar to [OptionButton], but doesn't feature a dropdown (for that you can use [constant CELL_MODE_RANGE]). Clicking the button emits the [signal Tree.item_edited] signal. The button is flat by default, you can use [method set_custom_as_button] to display it with a [StyleBox]. This mode also supports custom drawing using [method set_custom_draw_callback].
